summary: All 3 public import Cslib.Init declarations (Connectives.lean, InferenceSystem.lean, FrameConditions.lean) can be downgraded to plain import. Requires 5 compensating import Cslib.Init additions in downstream Foundations/Logic files (Axioms, DeductionHelpers, ProofSystem, Combinators, Theorems.lean). Task 70 previously attempted this but failed because it omitted the compensating imports. lake shake confirms the exact change set. 8 mechanical edits total, no semantic changes.

artifacts.summary: Complete import chain analysis with per-file breakdown, downstream impact assessment, and 8-edit change set specification
